modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating a Building Block in Word.

full_description_text: User is attempting to create a Building Block in Word. They are unsure of the process. There is confusion regarding the necessary steps. Further assistance is needed to resolve this issue.
